text: Amazon Fraud Detector @ st © sarnes ¢ Fully managed Fraud Detection service * .. new account creations, payments, guest checkout ¢ Upload historical data, choose model type e .. Online Fraud - Little historical data e.g. new customer account e .. Transaction Fraud - transactional history, identifying suspect payments e .. Account Takeover - Identify phishing or another social based attack * Things are scored .....Rules/Decision Logic allow you to react to a score based on business activity
